entries.title: Engagement Approval — Business Contract
verified_against: spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21): distilled from shipped comment/outbound contracts + binding approval invariants formerly in agent entrypoints; no invented behavior
default-off auto_execute + Policy Gate floor per comment-intelligence design and AGENTS.md approval invariant
ownership control predicate + verified-state-centric policy per direct-post-intake-workflow / v2-outbound-refactor-design
entries.notes: Business layer of the engagement-approval experience: approval-required default with explicit per-org auto_execute opt-in, auto-execution hard preconditions (verified actor, grounded content), channel discipline (inbox CS-style + first-touch semantics), ownership predicate, verified-outcome success measures. Full Policy-Gate enforcement remains partial (comment-intelligence P2d/P2e).

entries.title: Engagement Approval — Operator Experience
verified_against: spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21): submission/verification operator flows sourced from comment-automation technical.md + direct-link smoke runbook + direct-post-intake workflow; planned Policy-Gate UI explicitly flagged
human_required checkpoint behavior per account-safety state machine
actor-mismatch block + clear-actor-block endpoint per multi-actor-coverage
entries.notes: Experience layer of engagement-approval: shipped submission acknowledgements, verification states (waiting_verification, human-verify only for submitted_unverified), typed block reasons, actor-mismatch clearing, human_required behavior. Planned P2d/P2e Policy-Gate UI and Decision Inspector explicitly flagged as not shipped.
